params_used.custom_text: // This module is designed to select one of four 5-bit input signals (d, c, b, a) based on a 2-bit select input (sel). The output (o) reflects the value of the selected input according to the state of sel, where sel = 00 outputs d, sel = 01 outputs c, sel = 10 outputs b, and sel = 11 outputs a.
